Findings.Title: Branch protection is not enabled on default branch
Findings.Detail: Score 0/10. The default branch does not have branch protection rules configured. This allows direct pushes without review.
Findings.Remediation: Enable branch protection on the default branch requiring at least one review approval and status checks.

Findings.Title: Dependencies are pinned to specific versions
Findings.Detail: Score 10/10. All dependencies in package manifests and GitHub Actions workflows are pinned to specific versions or SHA hashes.

Findings.Title: SAST tool is not integrated in CI pipeline
Findings.Detail: Score 0/10. No static analysis security testing (SAST) tool detected in CI/CD pipeline configuration.
Findings.Remediation: Integrate a SAST tool such as CodeQL or Semgrep into the CI pipeline.

Findings.Title: Signed releases are not configured
Findings.Detail: Score 2/10. Repository releases are not signed. Signed releases help verify artifact provenance and integrity.
Findings.Remediation: Configure GPG signing for releases and enable Sigstore for artifact attestation.
